text:
If only a limited number of drugs on the tier are covered during the coverage gap phase then 
the value will be “Y”. If all drugs on the tier are covered during the gap, then the value will be “N”. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: GAP_TIER_PARTIAL 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 

N = No 

9 = Not Applicable 

X = Unknown 

COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2008. This variable applies only to enhanced plans with gap coverage. This 
variable also appears in the
